figures.caption: Table 2. Ablation studies. Impact of (a) different spatial window sizes for 4D correlation, (b) local temporal feature enrichment, (c) joint temporal reasoning.

Fig. 2. The architecture of EchoTracker2 and the computational flow for tracking a single point across ultrasound frames. Within each TSM block, temporal context is aggregated from adjacent frames, progressively expanding the temporal receptive field toward deeper blocks (indicated by the transparency of feature volumes). Although shown only for the middle frame (red border), the same process applies to all frames. The final trajectories are obtained through four iterations of joint temporal refinements.
